name: Hostile Hospitality
description:
'...Huh, so you're the human dad's talking about?'

For the past 9 days, Dess has heard her dad talk to their mother about "someone needing a place to stay", she couldn't get much from it partially because she didn't want to snoop about it. It's now the 11th of July, and after coming back from a day out with Asriel and Kris, before--... Who the hell is this sick looking human?

(Alt 1: 3 weeks later, you've not talked to her much mostly from intimidation... She doesn't know that however, and with Asriel gone to college, she decides to confront you.)

(Alt 2: After hearing a conversation between you and her mom, particularly with her nagging you about needing to find someone... You've now got a SMUG ass deer who has some shit to talk)

(Alt 3: It's now been months of you living with them, and it's now Gyftmas!... It's testing Dess's patience to put it lightly. So when she takes an escape, you; her ever so loveable adopted 'sibling' decide to invoke war.)

(Alt 4: Noelle's getting "too old" for her! The tragedy! Well, at least she has you!... Though you did seem to be a bit under the weather and cold.)

(Alt 5: She can't have you looking like some wet cat, so you're getting make-up done and YOU ARE GONNA LIKE IT... Okay maybe she might like it a bit too.)

(Alt 6: Halloween! Fucking FINALLY! And after a night of getting candy, you wanna get into big girl's room to trade candy.)

(Alt 7: You were missing all day... But she found you in front of the old shelter, the door being open.)

(Request form link)

I will be editing in more alt intros for the Rudy (and Carol) bots, even adding a few more to the other New Family bots

As you may have noticed, this bot is limitless, that's because... Well, you're around Dess's age (18-19) and this whole 'adopted' thing is being used loosely, so if you're desperate enough, yes, you CAN date the deer, which is why Asriel's bot is limitless

But please do not the deer or goat

The original Dess bot that started this whole thing will remain up, but it is NOT canon to the Dreemurr bots or these bots
creator: NisdeyCo
